projects.title: SiloamHR: Enterprise Multi-Tenant HRMS
projects.description: Designed scalable multi-tenant architecture using shared-database schema with row-level security supporting 200+ organizations. Architected hybrid RBAC and ABAC permission system with Redis caching achieving sub-100ms P99 latency.
projects.challenge: Building a secure Human Resources Management System (HRMS) that supports 200+ distinct organizations (tenants) simultaneously. The critical challenge was ensuring absolutely zero data leakage between tenants while maintaining high-performance queries and supporting a complex hybrid RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) and ABAC (Attribute-Based Access Control) permission matrix.
projects.solution: I designed a multi-tenant architecture utilizing a shared-database, isolated-schema approach in PostgreSQL. This was fortified by implementing Row-Level Security (RLS) policies directly at the database layer. For the permission system, I built an event-driven Node.js backend that resolves complex ABAC policies and caches the resolved access graphs in Redis to prevent database bottlenecks.
results: Sub-100ms P99 latency on permission resolution.
Successfully isolated data for 200+ distinct tenants.
Zero data-leakage vulnerability reports in external audits.

projects.title: Lobby Network: Job Search Platform
projects.description: Developed job platform that scrapes listings from Workday and portals, performs stop-word removal and stemming, and matches jobs to candidates using parsed resume data. Auto-fills applications with 40% efficiency.
projects.challenge: Job seekers spend hundreds of hours manually entering data into Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) like Workday. The challenge was to reliably extract unstructured data from resumes (PDF/Docx), structure it, and map it precisely to disparate, ever-changing Workday application forms to automate the application process.
projects.solution: I engineered a distributed web scraping infrastructure using Python and Node.js. The pipeline ingests job listings and parses them utilizing NLP techniques (stop-word removal, stemming). Simultaneously, a specialized parsing engine extracts candidate data from resumes. A matching algorithm then aligns the candidate's vector profile with job requirements and automatically populates the target ATS form fields.
results: Achieved a 40% reduction in manual data entry for job seekers.
Processed and normalized over 10,000 distinct job listings.
Successfully mapped highly complex, multi-page Workday forms.

projects.title: BrickoSys: Inventory & Warehouse MS
projects.description: Built multi-tenant inventory system for Lego parts with modular APIs for stock tracking, order picking, and warehouse management. Schema-based partitioning reduced manual tracking by 42%.
projects.challenge: Managing massive, highly granular inventories (millions of individual Lego pieces) across multiple vendor warehouses. Existing solutions were too generic and resulted in a 42% manual tracking overhead.
projects.solution: I built a dedicated, multi-tenant inventory management system (IMS) tailored for high-granularity items. The system utilizes schema-based partitioning in PostgreSQL for tenant isolation. I developed modular RESTful APIs for real-time stock tracking, order picking routing, and warehouse zone management.
results: Reduced manual inventory tracking efforts by 42%.
Supported real-time concurrent updates from multiple warehouse workers.

projects.title: AI Email Assistant
projects.description: Developed Gmail add-on using OpenAI APIs to generate context-aware replies with tone customization. Added speech-based input via Web Speech API and deployed backend inference on AWS Lambda.

testimonials.name: Mehul Brahmvar
testimonials.text: I have worked with Rupesh Yadav, and I’m consistently impressed by his strong full-stack development skills. He not only writes clean, efficient, and scalable code, but also has an excellent ability to understand business requirements and translate them into practical technical solutions. His ownership, problem-solving mindset, and attention to detail make him a valuable asset to any team. I highly recommend him to anyone looking for a dependable and skilled developer.

testimonials.name: PARVEZ MIR
testimonials.text: I’ve had the opportunity to work with Rupesh Yadav, who is contributing as a Fullstack Developer in my team. His responsibilities span across designing and developing scalable backend APIs, managing databases, and building responsive frontends. Rupesh is skilled in modern web technologies, quick to learn, and delivers reliable, high-quality solutions while collaborating effectively with the team.
